app_release_notes: v0.16.18 - Restores Apple code-signing and notarization. The build pipeline silently fell back to adhoc signing on 2026-05-18 after a transient timestamp-server hiccup on one PyQt5 binary; every release since installed cleanly only because friends had a prior copy. v0.16.18 is the first release since v0.13.x that opens without a Gatekeeper prompt for new downloads. No functional changes from v0.16.17.
